series_metadata.series_title: Long-term Care Consumer Guide Family Survey, Care Center Portal, and Navigator
series_metadata.series_description: The Long-term Care Consumer Guide, Care Center Portal, and Navigator, a state of Ohio website and internal operating program that contains data and other information about long-term care facilities, information that is helpful to the family members of people living in nursing homes and assisted care facilities, is created and updated periodically via information received from a variety of sources, including, family and consumer surveys, facilities, and government data or websites.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy when data is no longer of administrative value or is overwritten. ; Electronic: Destroy when data is no longer of administrative value or is overwritten., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
